{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

```{r}
#| include: false
footer_tex <- sprintf("\\renewcommand{\\FooterText}{%s}", sR$h2020_funding_statement)
```

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
`r footer_tex`
:::

{{< include _header.qmd >}}

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\FloatBarrier
:::

## `{r} sR$headings$introduction`

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIntroductionTexts"}

```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_introduction.Rmd")
```

:::

{{< include content/_introduction-list.qmd >}}

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIntroductionTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_introduction-caution.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\FloatBarrier
:::

## `{r} sR$headings$patient_population`

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIntroductionTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_patient-population.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeBirthWeightFigure"}
{{< include figures/_fig-bw.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible unless-meta="includeGestationalAgeFigure"}
{{< pagebreak >}}

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\FloatBarrier
:::
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeGestationalAgeFigure"}
{{< include figures/_fig-ga.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\FloatBarrier
:::
:::

## `{r} sR$headings$nosocomial_infections`

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIntroductionTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_nosocomial_infections.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIncidenceDensityTable"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-incidence-density-rates.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeDeviceAssociatedIncidenceDensityTable"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeSecondaryBsiRateTable"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-secondary-bsi-rates.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\FloatBarrier
:::

### `{r} sR$headings$infectious_agents`

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIntroductionTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_infectious-agents.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeAgentPerInfectionRateTable"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-agent-per-infection-rate.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeResistantPathogenInfectionRateTable"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-abr-infection-rate.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

### `{r} sR$headings$diagnostics`

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIntroductionTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_diagnostics.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeInfectiousAgentDetectionRateTable"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-infectious-agent-detection-rate.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeAntibioticResistanceTestRateTable"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-resistance-test-rate.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\FloatBarrier
:::

## `{r} sR$headings$risk_and_protective_factors`

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIntroductionTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_risk-factors.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeRiskDensityRateTable"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-risk-density-rates.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\FloatBarrier
:::

### `{r} sR$surgical_procedures`

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIntroductionTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_surgery.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeSurgicalProcedureRateTable"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-surgical-procedure-rates.qmd >}}
:::
